$comment: Kit toolchain manifest — DATA only (versions, floors, policy); check/install logic lives in cli/src/engine-native/toolchain.ts with per-surface sync callbacks in cli/src/engine-native/. kind: required (preflight hard dep) | check (doctor visibility only) | managed (kit installs/upgrades it) | pin (no binary probe — a version pin for a tool the kit invokes via npx). policy (managed only): track (upgrade toward latest, gated by `verified`) | present (install when missing, never upgrade). `verified` = last kit-tested version — anything above it prompts before install (--yes auto-accepts; non-TTY declines and falls back to the pinned `verified` when pinnable). Supply-chain stance: every kit-driven install is pinned to `verified` or gated by it — never floating @latest (npm-worm/Shai-Hulud surface). Update `verified` after testing a new release.

git.note: plugin marketplaces (claude/codex clone them) + kit checkout updates

claude.note: kit floor — `best` alias + Fable 5 need >=2.1.170 (mirrors settings minimumVersion)

codex.note: upstream-owned; standalone installer prints when missing

intelephense.note: php-lsp server binary; `verified` pins claude::sync_lsp_servers' npm install

typescript-language-server.note: typescript-lsp server binary; `verified` pins claude::sync_lsp_servers' npm install

tsc.note: typescript-lsp dependency (npm package `typescript`); `verified` pins claude::sync_lsp_servers' npm install. Deliberately on the 6.x line: typescript-language-server embeds TypeScript's programmatic API, which TS7 (native) doesn't yet expose — the repo's own devDependency runs TS7 for tsc --noEmit

rtk.note: PreToolUse hook — supply-chain review before unverified upgrades; installer honors RTK_VERSION=vX.Y.Z pin

bun.note: runtime for effect-solutions + the docks-kit CLI; bootstrap installs the verified release (installer takes bun-vX.Y.Z); self-updates via `bun upgrade` when wanted

effect-solutions.note: Effect docs CLI (bun global) — track keeps it self-upgrading, gated by the verified pin

agent-browser.note: browser-automation CLI (npm global), gated by the verified pin; first install also downloads Chrome for Testing

skills-cli.note: the `skills` npm package the kit runs via `npx skills@<verified>` on every agents sync (universal-skill install/remove) — pinned, never @latest
